target.name: Ras GTPase
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. Folded object would be one 166-residue H-Ras G-domain; the bound GTP-analog (GppNHp) and Mg2+ are not predicted.
target.omitted_context: Reference preview is 5P21 chain A protein atoms only (nucleotide and metal stripped). Bundled offline Fold needs a generated demo cache; until then, Fold requires the local backend.
